description: Declared and credibly speculated 2027 Nigerian presidential candidates. State collected: May 2026.
notes: Candidates listed are either formally declared or speculated in ≥2 reliable media sources as of Wikipedia's article.
APC endorsed Tinubu for re-election in May 2025.
Opposition coalition formed July 2025: Atiku Abubakar, David Mark, Rauf Aregbesola, Peter Obi.
Presidential election uses modified two-round system: winner must get 25%+ in at least 24 of 36 states + FCT.

data.name: Peter Gregory Obi
data.party_note: Defected from LP to ADC on 2025-12-31
data.notes: Stated he 'may not contest again after 2027' — ambiguous. Was LP candidate in 2023 with 25.40% nationally.

data.name: Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso
data.notes: Received 6.4% in 2023. Strong in Kano. NNPP currently holds Kano governorship.

data.name: Rotimi Amaechi
data.notes: Former Rivers State governor (2007-2015), former Minister of Transportation. APC member; would compete with Tinubu within the party.

data.name: Omoyele Sowore
data.notes: Human rights activist, founder of Sahara Reporters, African Action Congress. Ran in 2019.

data.name: Atiku Abubakar
data.notes: Joined opposition coalition July 2025. PDP candidate in 2019 and 2023. Former VP under Obasanjo 1999-2007.

gaps.note: 2027 governorship candidates for states holding elections not yet collected.
National Assembly candidates not yet declared as of May 2026.
